name: NinjaClawBot
description: Official OpenClaw tools and skills for NinjaClawBot hardware control.

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the NinjaClawBot project root.

rootDir.description: Optional root directory for ninjaclawbot config and assets. Defaults to projectRoot.

uvCommand.description: Command used to invoke uv. Defaults to 'uv'.

enablePersistentBridge.description: Enable the persistent NinjaClawBot bridge managed by the plugin. Defaults to true.

bridgeStartTimeoutMs.description: Startup timeout for the persistent NinjaClawBot bridge in milliseconds.

bridgeRequestTimeoutMs.description: Per-request timeout for the persistent NinjaClawBot bridge in milliseconds.

bridgeShutdownTimeoutMs.description: Shutdown timeout for the persistent NinjaClawBot bridge in milliseconds.

enableAlwaysOn.description: Enable lifecycle-driven Always On robot presence features. Defaults to true when the persistent bridge is enabled.

enableStartupGreeting.description: Play the automatic greeting and enter idle on gateway start. Defaults to true.

enableAutoThinking.description: Switch the robot into persistent thinking on message_received. Defaults to true.

enableShutdownSequence.description: Run the sleepy shutdown sequence before bridge teardown. Defaults to true.
